ceremony.name: St John the Evangelist Metropolitan Cathedral, Naga City
ceremony.address: Cathedral, Jacob, Naga City, Camarines Sur, Philippines

hero.tagline: Join Us In Celebrating Our Love

story.title: Our Story
story.content: We met in the spring of 2020, and it was love at first sight. After years of adventures together, we're ready to start our next chapter.

timeline.title: We Met
timeline.description: A chance encounter at a coffee shop changed everything.

timeline.title: The Proposal
timeline.description: Under the stars on a beach in Hawaii, the question was asked.

timeline.title: The Wedding
timeline.description: Join us as we celebrate our love and commitment.

events.title: Guest Arrival
events.description: Please arrive early to find your seat

events.title: Ceremony
events.description: Join us as we exchange vows

registry.title: Registry
registry.message: Your presence is the greatest gift, but if you wish to honor us with a gift, we've registered at the following:

questions.question: What should I wear?
questions.answer: Cocktail attire. We suggest dressy but comfortable shoes for the outdoor ceremony.

questions.question: Are children welcome?
questions.answer: We love your little ones, but this will be an adults-only celebration.

questions.question: Is there parking available?
questions.answer: Yes, there is ample free parking at the venue.

questions.question: Will food be provided?
questions.answer: Yes, a full dinner will be served with vegetarian options available.
